zh.lifeSummary: 當Marmaduke Jackson於1678年9月14日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁布利德林頓時，他的父親Nathaniel Jackson19歲，母親W O Nathaniel19歲。他於1707年2月14日與ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson在英國越可爾布利德林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1755年4月22日在英國英格蘭越可爾布利德林頓享年76歲，埋葬在英國越可爾布利德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Jackson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: patronymic from Jack . In North America, this surname has absorbed other patronymics beginning with J- in various European languages, in particular those derived from equivalents or short forms and other derivatives of the personal name Jacob , e.g. Norwegian Jacobsen or Jakobsen and, in some cases, Slovenian Jakše (from a derivative of the personal name Jakob ). This surname is also very common among African Americans (see also 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Jackson (or Andrew Jackson), adopted in honor of Andrew Jackson, the 7th president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in many cases probably for the same reason.

History: This extremely common British name was brought over by numerous different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One forebear was the father and namesake of the seventh US president, Andrew Jackson, who migrated to SC from Carrickfergus in the north of Ireland in 1765. The Confederate General Thomas ‘Stonewall’ Jackson came from VA, where his great-grandfather John, likewise of Scotch–Irish stock, had settled after emigrating to America in 1748.

variants.name: Jack
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Jak, Jakke, Jagge, Jake, Jeke, Jegge, a Picard-Flemish denasalized form of Old Picard and Middle Dutch Janke, a pet form of Jan (see John ). It was introduced by Flemings and Picards into Norman and Anglo-Norman usage, whence it became a common English and Scottish pet form of John. Although the surname is mainly Scottish in distribution, it also occurs in England, though the more common form there is Jackson .

English: occasionally perhaps from a Middle English borrowing of the Old French personal name Jacque(s) (James). However, it is uncertain whether English Jack was ever used as an alternative to James.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Jack (see 1 above) as a surname.

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

historicEvents.title: Gregorian Calendar is Adopted
historicEvents.description: Gregorian calendar was adopted in England in 1752. That year, Wednesday, September 2, 1752, was followed by Thursday, September 14th, 1752, which caused the country to skip ahead eleven days.

historicEvents.title: Seven Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Seven Years' War began as a North American conflict then stretched between England and France. England, along with allies, battled France in America, India, and Europe, making it arguably the first global war. The conflict ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris in 1763 and England was victorious. The Seven Years' war ultimately led to discontent in the colonies and the American Revolution.

en.lifeSummary: When Marmaduke Jackson was born on 14 September 1678, in Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nathaniel Jackson, was 19 and his mother, W O Nathaniel, was 19. He married ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson on 14 February 1707, in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 22 April 1755, in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marmaduke Jackson est né le 14 septembre 1678, à Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nathaniel Jackson, avait 19 ans et sa mère, W O Nathaniel, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson le 14 février 1707, à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1755, à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Marmaduke Jackson(이)가 1678년 9월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 브리들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nathaniel Jackson(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 W O Nathaniel(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1707년 2월 14일 영국 요르크실르 브리들링턴에서 ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1755년 4월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브리들링턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 브리들링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marmaduke Jackson nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1678, em Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nathaniel Jackson, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, W O Nathaniel, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson em 14 de fevereiro de 1707, em Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marmaduke Jackson родился 14 сентября 1678 г. в местности бридлингтон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nathaniel Jackson было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали W O Nathaniel, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson 14 февраля 1707 г. в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 апреля 1755 г. в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия.
